policy: No test file may remain under test/pending for final QA. Every skipped/gated test file must have owner, launch risk, reason, action, and verification before final QA can be claimed.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Dual LLM integration is skipped in CI or without local backend.

skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run only for model comparison claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Cloud provider smoke is intentionally gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS to avoid credential use in normal CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for live-provider release claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Cloud full-loop proof requires configured live credentials and is intentionally excluded from normal CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run before cloud full-loop launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: GLM provider proof is intentionally gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS to avoid live credential use in normal CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for GLM provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Kimi provider proof is intentionally gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS to avoid live credential use in normal CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for Kimi provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: LFM model e2e requires provider availability.
MiniMax M2.5 provider proof is intentionally gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS to avoid live credential use in normal CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: The current MiniMax token plan rejects MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed with provider error 2061.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run only before claiming MiniMax highspeed entitlement or upgrade the token plan.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax M2.7 provider proof is intentionally gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS to avoid live credential use in normal CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Qwen-compatible LM Studio proof is intentionally gated behind RUN_LOCAL_MODEL_TESTS because it requires a loaded local model.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for Qwen/local-provider release claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Qwen coder-compatible LM Studio proof is intentionally gated behind RUN_LOCAL_MODEL_TESTS because it requires a loaded local model.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep classified and run for Qwen/local-provider release claims.
